{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032304040701476697E018DF701B4A\"}"},"total":564},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7367780170952966937","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"同人文九叔看过很多，这本虽然不能算是最好，但也差不多了，前期40章内有些跟着原著走，稍微修改，当然接受，越到后面就融入自己的创新也挺好，阅读起来流畅，也没什么大毛病，剧情也挺好，不管是安排还是人物之间的交流比较舒心，没有那么特意，在番茄同人文九叔中，可以吊打90%以上，人物性格作风也符合书中的设定，分数应该是可以再提一提的，比起那些花钱刷分的强多了，值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715447528,"group_id":"7324159869978676286","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手，请多多支持，谢谢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N82V6ebyPxZNSK3A3Ci5rJ5FJWLJte/Rx4YzSwrtJW1t","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/662218a4125940939026ea0ce2eed8ac~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776791046\u0026x-signature=csp0KN7rSxuEBfuzzR0ugqonHZA%3D","user_id":"2991122689043304","user_name":"傅3"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2991122689043304","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742790332,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324159869978676286","book_info":{"abstract":"一不小心穿越了，还是大名鼎鼎的九叔世界，来到鬼怪世界当然要抱紧九叔大腿了，道家的功法，一身正气的九叔，神秘的茅山，看小道士陪伴九叔纵横僵尸世界，带大家回顾九叔的经典名场面","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/add8f529ac33aa60c438ecfb3487d466
